name: winzard
description: Winzard Forge, application templates and executable reference app.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/reference/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/forge/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.verify:documentation: pnpm forge check --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project && pnpm forge docs:check --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project && pnpm forge docs:generate --check --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project && pnpm forge docs:sync --check --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project && pnpm forge docs:adapters --check --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project && pnpm forge context:check ATLAS-TASK-0001 --project packages/forge/tests/fixtures/documented-project
scripts.verify:routing: pnpm forge route:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge route:docs --check --project apps/reference
scripts.verify:core: pnpm typegen && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm verify:documentation && pnpm verify:routing && pnpm verify:delivery && pnpm verify:kernel && pnpm verify:kernel-configuration && pnpm verify:composition && pnpm verify:views && pnpm verify:configuration && pnpm forge check --project apps/reference && pnpm verify:minimal-template && pnpm build && pnpm test:e2e:reference
scripts.verify:database: pnpm forge check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge env:check --project templates/webapp && pnpm db:validate:webapp && pnpm db:generate:webapp && pnpm verify:webapp-template && pnpm db:migrate:deploy:webapp
scripts.verify:delivery: pnpm forge delivery:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge http:contracts --check --project apps/reference
scripts.verify:views: pnpm forge view:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge view:contracts --check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge view:assets --check --project apps/reference
scripts.verify:configuration: pnpm forge config:drift --project . && pnpm forge config:drift --project apps/reference && pnpm forge config:reference --check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge config:drift --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge config:reference --check --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge config:drift --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge config:reference --check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge secrets:check --project .
scripts.verify:minimal-template: pnpm forge check --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge lifecycle:docs --check --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge kernel-config:docs --check --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge composition:generate --check --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge composition:check --resolve-config --project templates/minimal && pnpm forge composition:docs --check --project templates/minimal && vitest run --config templates/minimal/vitest.config.ts && next typegen templates/minimal && tsc -p templates/minimal/tsconfig.json --noEmit && next build templates/minimal
scripts.verify:webapp-template: pnpm forge check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge lifecycle:docs --check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge kernel-config:docs --check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge composition:generate --check --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge composition:check --resolve-config --project templates/webapp && pnpm forge composition:docs --check --project templates/webapp && vitest run --config templates/webapp/vitest.config.ts && next typegen templates/webapp && tsc -p templates/webapp/tsconfig.json --noEmit && next build templates/webapp
scripts.verify:kernel: pnpm forge kernel:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge request-context:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge response-policy:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge instrumentation:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge lifecycle:docs --check --project apps/reference
scripts.verify:kernel-configuration: pnpm forge kernel-config:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge runtime:check --project apps/reference --runtime-mode web && pnpm forge proxy:trust --project apps/reference && pnpm forge locale:check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge kernel-config:docs --check --project apps/reference
scripts.verify:composition: pnpm forge composition:generate --check --project apps/reference && pnpm forge composition:check --resolve-config --project apps/reference && pnpm forge composition:docs --check --project apps/reference
